diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Chordoid glioma of the third ventricle
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The diagnosis was established based on the biopsy findings, which showed epithelioid cells in a background of hyalinized vessels, frequently cuffed by mature lymphocytes and plasma cells. The tumor cells were strongly positive for glial fibrillary acidic protein (GFAP). The absence of necrosis and mitoses, along with the specific histological features, supported the diagnosis of chordoid glioma of the third ventricle.
